body:
## Purpose
Extends the existing ClimaLand calibration pipeline with the two remaining steps of the [CalibrateEmulateSample.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/CalibrateEmulateSample.jl) (CES) UQ workflow — emulation and MCMC sampling — enabling full uncertainty quantification after a `ClimaCalibrate` run. Also adds an end-to-end site-level tutorial demonstrating the full CES pipeline with the ClimaLand land surface model.

## To-do
- Add user-facing documentation section for emulate + sample steps in `docs/src/calibration.md`

## Content

### Production pipeline scripts
- `experiments/calibration/emulate.jl`: Loads EKP checkpoints from a completed `ClimaCalibrate` run via `load_latest_ekp`, trains a GP emulator using `CalibrateEmulateSample.Emulators` (GPJL / GaussianProcess / `optimize_hyperparameters!`), and saves the emulator plus observation metadata to `ces_output_dir/emulators.jld2`. Reads config from the same env vars (`CALIBRATION_OUTPUT_DIR`, `CALIBRATION_CONFIG`) as `run_calibration.jl`.
- `experiments/calibration/sample.jl`: Loads the saved emulator and runs RWMH-MCMC via `CalibrateEmulateSample.MarkovChainMonteCarlo` (MCMCWrapper / `optimize_stepsize` / `sample` / `get_posterior`) to produce a full posterior over the calibrated parameters. Logs constrained posterior statistics (mean, std, 95% CI).
- `experiments/calibration/test/test_ces_pipeline.jl`: End-to-end integration test exercising the full Calibrate → Emulate → Sample pipeline without running the real land model, using a toy forward model G(emissivity) = 240 × emissivity. All 12 tests pass.

### Tutorial
- `docs/src/tutorials/calibration/perfect_model_site_level_ces.jl`: Single-site perfect-model CES tutorial using US-MOz FLUXNET forcing. Calibrates `Vcmax25` via EKI against synthetic LHF, trains and validates a GP emulator, and runs RWMH-MCMC to recover the true parameter. Uses physically realistic values (true `Vcmax25 = 1.5e-4` mol m⁻² s⁻¹ ≈ 150 μmol; prior `N(1e-4, 5e-5)` bounded `[0, 2e-4]`), in the LHF-sensitive regime (a sensitivity sweep confirmed LHF responds across the physical range and saturates only at unphysically high values). The posterior recovers the truth (mean ≈ 146 μmol vs. true 150; EKI MAP ≈ 154) and is much narrower than the prior (posterior std ≈ 18 μmol vs. prior 50; truth within the 95% CI [112, 181] μmol). Includes a posterior predictive check against the true model `G`, precomputed offline (50 posterior + 50 prior pushforwards) and committed as a static figure so it doesn't slow the docs build.
- `docs/list_tutorials.jl`: Registered under "Calibrating a ClimaLand model" as "Single site perfect model (CES/UQ)".


---

- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Add CES emulate + sample pipeline
